string.text:
%c[ui_gray_1]Upgrade kit for the OTs-02 Kiparis submachine gun. It contains a lightweight bolt group and a trigger mechanism that increases the rate of fire. Green tritium sights, Tactical mount and laser sight. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Features: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Increased rate of fire.
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Increased accuracy.
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] 9mm 50-round drum magazine.
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] New rear sight with tritium sights.
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Tactical Red Laser.

The Vorkuta Upgrade kit for the KS-23 adds a threaded barrel for introduction of a suppressor and attachable PU scope for better range combats. The Kit name suggests its origin might be from the city under the same name. \n \n
Blood Diamon Upgrade kit for the CAR-15. Replicates the look of a classic Hollywood rifle for those that want to live out their Rhodesian role-play fantasy in the zone.\n \n

Admin Upgrade kit for the CAR-15. Updates the Classic rifle to bring it more in line with modern M4 style rifles. This kit adds an Aimpoint T2 with G33 Magnifier and replaced the stock and handguard with more contemporary furniture. A LAM and flashlight have also been mounted to the front to assist in target aquisition in dark and light environments.\n \n
